chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُنَّ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْإِمَاءِ وَ لَيْسَتْ مِنَ الْأَرْبَعِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 94 – They (wives of Mut’a) are at the status of slave girls, and are not from the four (wives allowed)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/231)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/231)
text: قُلْتُ مَا يَحِلُّ مِنَ الْمُتْعَةِ قَالَ كَمْ شِئْتَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Zurara Bin Ayn who said,
‘I said, ‘What is Permissible from the Mut’a?’ Heasws said: ‘As many as you so desire to’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from ibn Ri’ab from Zurarah ibn ‘A‘yan who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘How many is lawful for al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is as many as you wish.’”
